summary: ITER-51 BIG batch — backend + frontend testing completed. 12 new iter-51 tests added covering plan bifurcation (category + meal_window), /admin/content/login marquee_* merge, /admin/landing/upload-image multipart, /attendance/scan meal_window enforcement (lunch-only sub rejects dinner scan with HTTP 403), and static inspection of the 402 BudgetExceeded code-path in routes/restaurant.py. Full regression: 73 passed / 1 skipped (was 61/1 in iter-48 baseline — +12 new tests, all green). Frontend: /login marquee renders rgb(160,35,35) bg with 8 pills (16 DOM-duplicated for seamless loop); /restaurant Pure Veg badge bg=rgb(255,255,255) color=rgb(5,122,58) per spec; /admin/plans shows 3 category tabs + field-category & field-meal-window selects in the create dialog + Tiffin tab correctly filters to empty-state; /plans toggles centered; /checkout flex-col sm:flex-row confirmed in source.

minor.issue: Passing empty-string values (e.g. marquee_bg_color:"") into the data dict persists them as empty strings instead of unsetting / falling back to DEFAULTS. Frontend then renders bg='' (transparent). Recommend: skip empty-string keys server-side OR have AdminContent UI send DELETE / null sentinel to reset to defaults. Repro: POST /admin/content/login with {data:{marquee_bg_color:''}} → GET returns marquee_bg_color:'' (not the default '#a02323').

action_items: MINOR: harden /admin/content/login to ignore empty-string overrides for color/numeric keys so DEFAULT_CONTENT fallback wins (the AdminContent UI form currently treats blank field as empty string, not 'reset').
FYI: Razorpay LIVE keys still rejected (Auth failed banner in admin Plans page) — flagged as user-side credential issue per request brief, no code change.
FYI: 402 budget-exhausted return on /admin/restaurant/menu/generate-image verified by static inspection only — couldn't trigger live without exhausting the universal key.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/restaurant.py 402 branch correctly checks substring 'budget has been exceeded' (case-insensitive) on Exception(str()) — robust against litellm's BudgetExceededError without import coupling. Good.
server.py _mark_attendance enforces sub.meal_window vs scan meal_type and returns HTTP 403 with explicit 'lunch-only'/'dinner-only' message. Correctly placed before attendance-record insertion.
routes/plans.py PlanUpsert.category and meal_window are lower-cased on persist with safe defaults ('dining' / 'both') — good.
/admin/content/login endpoint stores arbitrary keys via merge; consider adding a Pydantic LoginContentSchema in a future iter to prevent typo'd keys from polluting the doc.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all visible UI checks pass on /login, /restaurant, /plans, /admin/plans

test_credentials: Admin OTP phone=9970705391 (dev_otp returned by /api/auth/send-otp in dev_mode). Subscriber OTP phone=9876543210.
seed_data_creation: Synthetic lunch-only subscription doc inserted directly into mongo for the subscriber user during TestMealWindowEnforcement class; teardown deletes it + today's attendance row.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter-51 test file is /app/backend/tests/test_iter51.py. The OTP rate-limiter (rate_limit_hits collection) frequently 429's after a few send-otp calls in a row; clear with: await db.rate_limit_hits.delete_many({}). The TestMealWindowEnforcement fixture writes directly to db.subscriptions (bypassing Razorpay because LIVE keys are failing auth) — preserves a clean teardown. Marquee key cleanup on content/login currently leaves keys as empty strings (not absent) — see minor issue. Razorpay LIVE auth failure is USER-side credentials, do not attempt to fix.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical issues found. Single minor: admin marquee cleanup with empty strings overrides defaults (described above).
